noAgentAvailable: No Main Agent is available. Please login to Google or install Claude/Codex CLI. Go to settings?
noAgentAvailableShort: No Main Agent available. Click to configure.
agentTabAutoSwitch: Model not compatible with Gemini, auto-switched to {{fallback}}
autoSwitchToAgent: Gemini is not configured, auto-switching to {{agent}}

installMissingAgents: {{agents}} is not detected or not enabled. Install or enable it first.

scanning.initialMessage: Current Agent is unavailable, detecting other available agents...

loopGoal.placeholder: Describe a goal worth continuing. After each run, the Agent will return to this goal, review the result, and move the next useful step forward.

larkProject.leaderInitialPrompt: Act as the leader Agent for the Lark tasklist "{{tasklistName}}". First align with me on goals, participants, responsibilities, milestones, and execution boundaries. Before I explicitly approve the plan, do not create, assign, modify, or close tasks.
larkProject.agentInitialPrompt: Enter the Lark tasklist "{{tasklistName}}", read the project context first, and wait for my next instruction.
larkProject.createFailed: Failed to create the project container
larkProject.draftCreated: Project planning draft created. Let the leader Agent discuss the plan before execution.
larkProject.leaderInactive: Turn on to coordinate this project
larkProject.noSyncedTasklists: No Lark tasklists have been synced yet.
larkProject.leaderContextHint: The whole tasklist is assigned to the leader Agent. It will confirm goals, members, and cadence with you before executing the approved plan.
larkProject.noFocusedTasks: This tasklist does not have focusable tasks yet.
larkProject.focusedTaskHint: This task will be added to the Agent context as a focus item. Click again to remove it.
larkProject.descriptionHelp: You may @ candidate contacts first. They will only be added to the leader Agent planning context and will not be assigned tasks yet.
larkProject.descriptionPlaceholder:
Describe the project here.
Include goals, background, constraints, or type @ to add candidate participants.
larkProject.keepTypingContacts: Keep typing to search Lark contacts
larkProject.contactsHelp: Contacts come from Lark. Add them with @ mentions or checkboxes.
larkProject.addParticipantsHint: Add contacts with @ mentions or checkboxes.

skillDeposition.contextHint: Tip: Knowledge Deposition summarizes past research experience and creates your own scientific Skills
